description: Guarded deployed testnet sponsored-gas check: verifies CreatorGasTank/EntryPoint env wiring, bytecode, read-only on-chain config, and the ERC-7677 platform API endpoint.

data.guardPolicy: Requires COMMONALITY_VERIFIER_ENABLE_TESTNET_SMOKE=1 and COMMONALITY_TESTNET_RPC_URL before probing sponsored-gas deployed contract bytecode/config and BASE_SEPOLIA_PAYMASTER_URL endpoint behavior.
